why.label: Why INCOZONE
why.headline: The Advisory Standard UAE Business Demands

pillars.title: Strategic Advisory Approach
pillars.desc: We assess your business model first — structure follows strategy, never the reverse. Zone selection is a consequence of clarity, not guesswork.

pillars.desc: Deep relationships across UAE free zone authorities, DED, GDRFA, and MOFA ensure frictionless approvals and direct officer access.

pillars.title: Transparent Structuring
pillars.desc: Clear timelines, documented processes, and zero hidden fees. Every cost is disclosed before you commit to a single dirham.

pillars.title: Dedicated Relationship Manager
pillars.desc: One point of contact for every interaction — proactive, accountable, and available. Your RM knows your company as well as you do.

footer.tagline: UAE's premier private advisory firm for business incorporation, corporate structuring, and government liaison services.

zones.name: DMCC
zones.desc: The world's largest free zone by member count. Unmatched prestige, institutional banking relationships, and commodity trading infrastructure.

zones.name: IFZA
zones.desc: Dubai's fastest-growing free zone. Highly competitive pricing with genuine institutional infrastructure and rapid setup timelines.

zones.name: Meydan
zones.desc: Premium free zone in the heart of Dubai's most iconic district. Ideal for consultancies, tech firms, and lifestyle brands.

zones.name: RAKEZ
zones.desc: Northern Emirates' most competitive zone. Ideal for manufacturing, trading, and industrial operations at consistently low cost.

zones.name: SHAMS
zones.desc: UAE's leading media-focused free zone. Designed for content creators, media companies, and consultancies seeking Sharjah presence.

zones.name: JAFZA
zones.desc: The world's largest free zone by area. Unmatched for logistics, import/export, and large-scale trade and warehousing operations.

zones.name: AFZ
zones.desc: UAE's most affordable free zone option. Perfect for startups, freelancers, and cost-conscious entrepreneurs entering the market.

zones.name: ADGM
zones.desc: Abu Dhabi's world-class international financial centre. Premier destination for financial services, funds, fintech, and HNW structures.

services.heroBody: Six core service lines. One integrated advisory relationship.

services.title: Free Zone Company Formation
services.desc: End-to-end free zone incorporation across all UAE jurisdictions. License selection, authority submission, visa quota, and banking introduction.

services.title: Mainland Company Formation
services.desc: DED-licensed mainland LLC, professional license, or branch registration. Sponsor management, tenancy contracting, and chamber registration.

services.title: Corporate & PRO Advisory
services.desc: Government liaison, visa processing, trade license renewals, share transfers, and complete regulatory compliance management.

services.title: UAE Investor Visa
services.desc: Residency visa processing for company owners, shareholders, and family members. Golden Visa assessment and submission.

services.title: Corporate Banking Setup
services.desc: UAE business bank account opening strategy, documentation preparation, and relationship-managed bank introductions.

services.title: Company Amendments
services.desc: Share transfers, director changes, activity additions, trade name amendments, and corporate restructuring facilitation.

about.heroHeadline: Twelve Years at the Heart of UAE Business Formation.
about.heroBody: Founded in 2012, INCOZONE has guided over 3,200 companies through UAE incorporation — from single-founder startups to multi-jurisdictional family office structures.
about.missionHeadline: We exist to make UAE market entry intelligent, dignified, and efficient.
about.storyBody: INCOZONE was founded by advisors who were tired of watching founders receive conflicting guidance, inflated quotes, and anonymous service from incorporation mills. We built the firm on three principles: structural clarity before jurisdiction selection, total fee transparency before engagement, and a named advisor as the single point of accountability for every client.

values.title: Clarity Before Speed
values.body: We never rush a client into a jurisdiction. Structure must be understood before it is executed.

values.title: Named Accountability
values.body: Every client has one named relationship manager. No ticket systems, no anonymous queues.

values.title: Zero Hidden Costs
values.body: Every dirham is disclosed in writing before engagement. No surprises at invoice.

values.title: Permanent Partnership
values.body: We are not a one-transaction firm. We manage your UAE entity for its entire lifecycle.

contact.heroHeadline: Let's build your UAE structure together.
contact.heroBody: Tell us about your business and we'll match you to the right zone, license type, and structure — with full cost transparency before you commit to anything.

faqItems.q: How long does a typical UAE company formation take?
faqItems.a: Free zone formations typically take 5–14 business days. RAKEZ and AFZ can complete in 3–5 days. DMCC and ADGM require 10–14 days. Visa processing adds 14–21 days.

faqItems.q: Do I need to be present in the UAE?
faqItems.a: No. Most clients complete formation entirely remotely. Visa applications and Emirates ID collection do require a UAE visit — we manage all scheduling.

faqItems.q: What is the minimum capital requirement?
faqItems.a: Most free zone entities have no minimum paid-up capital. DMCC requires AED 50,000 nominal share capital. Mainland entities have sector-specific requirements.

faqItems.q: Can I open a UAE bank account as a non-resident?
faqItems.a: Yes. Non-residents holding a UAE trade license can open business accounts. Physical presence at the bank is typically required — we arrange all introductions.

faqItems.q: How do I know which free zone is right for me?
faqItems.a: Our initial consultation maps your activity, customers, visa requirements, and budget to 2–3 structured zone recommendations with clear trade-offs explained.

schedule.heroBody: A focused 30 or 60-minute session with a senior INCOZONE advisor. We'll map your business to the right UAE structure.
